title: Super-soft symmetry energy encountering non-Newtonian gravity in neutron stars
author_string: De-Hua Wen, Bao-An Li, Lie-Wen Chen
abstract: Considering the non-Newtonian gravity proposed in the grand unification theories, we show that the stability and observed global properties of neutron stars can not rule out the super-soft nuclear symmetry energies at supra-saturation densities. The degree of possible violation of the Inverse-Square-Law of gravity in neutron stars is estimated using an Equation of State (EOS) of neutron-rich nuclear matter consistent with the available terrestrial laboratory data.
comment: Version accepted by Physical Review Letters
